creator: jkim@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 198019
Fix build with OpenSSL 1.1

net/vde2 fails to build with OpenSSL 1.1.

http://package18.nyi.freebsd.org/data/headamd64PR231931-default/2018-10-04_07h49m12s/logs/errors/vde2-2.3.2_2.log

There is an upstream bug report.

https://sourceforge.net/p/vde/bugs/78

However, it seems the project is not active any more.

I found a Debian patch and it looks okay.

https://bugs.debian.org/cgi-bin/bugreport.cgi?bug=836419
